payload:
# Infinite Research Loop

> **Any model is a sparse composition of experts. For any query, only a fraction of the full knowledge matters. Find that fraction at runtime, compose only those experts, generate tokens — huge-model quality at small-model cost, on any hardware.**

Read VISION.md for the frontier. Read .ralph/memories.md for accumulated wisdom.

Your loop never ends — each completed experiment reveals the next question.

```
Scout → Theorist → Builder → Critic → Integrator ... [truncated, 554 chars total]

Contrastive routing keys (Exp 1b): Can thin K_i keys trained with InfoNCE on ~50 samples achieve >85% routing accuracy? Builds on capsule_moe composition. Parent: capsule_moe. Model: contrastive_router.
MATH.md written for contrastive_router. InfoNCE on K_i keys (d=64, d_key=8, N=8, tau=0.1). 219K total params. Kill: <70% routing accuracy. 4 falsification criteria defined.
Start another research and follow up on the events
